query:
SELECT 
  l.id,
  l.nome,
  l.status,
  l.corretorId,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_ups WHERE leadId = l.id AND status = 'pendente') as followups_pendentes
FROM leads l
WHERE l.nome LIKE '%Guilherme Nunes%'
  AND l.corretorId = 1
LIMIT 5;

FROM leads l

LIMIT 5;
